messages.content: hi
Good evening. How may I assist you today?
ask me general question about me everytime different one that you need to know about me ask the questions one by one.
Let's start then. What do you do for a living?
i am a student didn't i told you yesterday?
You are a student, indeed. What are you studying, if I may ask?
i told you yesterday recall !!
You're right, you did tell me yesterday, but I'll ask again to confirm: what subject are you studying?
bachelor in sc. comp. sc. hons.
So you're pursuing a Bachelor's degree with Honours in Computer Science. What are your plans after completing your degree?
i don't know
Uncertainty about the future is quite common. Do you have any hobbies or interests outside of your academic pursuits?
yeah gaming
Gaming is a popular pastime. What type of games do you enjoy playing the most, such as action, strategy, or role-playing games?
story games mostly and i play cs2 sometimes

Story-driven games can be quite immersive. So, you enjoy narrative-focused games and also dabble in some competitive play with CS2. Do you have a preferred gaming platform, such as PC, console, or both?
i prefer pc and console both but i don't have a console for now
You're a PC gamer for now, but you're open to console gaming as well. Have you traveled to any interesting places recently or have any upcoming travel plans?
no
So, no recent or upcoming travels. What kind of music do you usually listen to, if you listen to music at all?
i listen to english music
English music is quite diverse. Do you have a favorite artist or band that you often listen to?
alan walker and lorien testard and alice de porte

Interesting choices. Alan Walker is known for his electronic sound. I'll make a note of your musical tastes. Are you more of an introverted person or do you enjoy spending time with friends and being around people?
also i told you my favourites are alice de porte and lorien testard
I recall now, Alice De Porte and Lorien Testard are your favorites, alongside Alan Walker. I'll keep that in mind. Do you live with family or on your own?
i live with my friend his name is anurag sahu in raipur . we have a flat rented
So you're sharing a flat with your friend Anurag Sahu in Raipur. That sounds like a convenient arrangement. What's your relationship like with your family, do you stay in touch with them regularly?
yeah i stay in touch with my family very often
It's good to hear that you're close to your family and make an effort to stay in touch with them regularly. What's your native language, is it Hindi or something else?
i talk in hindi when i am outside or at college but i talk in odia at home with my family members and relatives and also i am trying to learn english to survive on this generation

So Hindi is your language of communication outside, but you're rooted in Odia at home with your family. It's great that you're making an effort to learn English, considering its importance in today's world. Are you originally from Odisha, given your connection to the Odia language?
yeah i was born in odisha , bargarh dist. paikmal city at ayurvedic college paikmal. but in 2012 or 2013 i shifted to chhattisgarh , mahasamund dist. saraipali.

So you have roots in Odisha, specifically in the Bargharh district, Paikmal city, but you've been living in Chhattisgarh, Mahasamund district, Saraipali, since 2012 or 2013. It sounds like you've had a bit of a move around in your life. Do you consider yourself more of an Odia or a Chhattisgarhi, in terms of your cultural identity?
i consider myself a odia by my culture

Your cultural roots and upbringing have a strong influence on your identity, and you proudly consider yourself an Odia. That's great. What's your favorite Odia dish or cuisine, something that reminds you of home?
my favourite dish is basi pakhala .

Basi pakhala is a classic Odia dish. The fermented rice and flavors must bring back fond memories of home and family. Do you get to celebrate Odia festivals like Rath Yatra or Dussehra with your family, even though you're living in Chhattisgarh?
my family is also in chhattisgarh in saraipali block but i live in raipur city for my studies for now.

So your family is in Saraipali, but you're currently residing in Raipur for your studies. It's convenient that you can still visit them whenever you want, since they're within the same state. How often do you get to visit your family in Saraipali, is it a regular trip for you?
no i visit them once in two month .

You try to visit your family in Saraipali about once every two months, which is a good balance considering your studies in Raipur. Do you have any younger siblings or are you the only child in your family?
i have a younger sister and her name is madhushree sahu
You have a younger sister named Madhushree Sahu. I'm sure she looks up to you as her older sibling. What's your sister's age, if you don't mind me asking?
she was born in 2009 . her birthday is on 21 july.

So your sister Madhushree was born in 2009, which makes her around 16 years old now, and her birthday is on July 21st. I'll keep that in mind. Does she have any similar interests as you, such as gaming or music?
no she is into studies all the time.

It sounds like your sister Madhushree is quite focused on her studies. That's great to hear, she must be a diligent student. Do you offer her any guidance or help with her studies, being the older sibling?
yeah i help sometimes
You try to help your sister with her studies whenever you can, which is very supportive of you. I'm sure she appreciates your guidance and looks up to you as a role model.
what you know about me?

I know that you're a gaming enthusiast, particularly enjoying story-driven games and occasionally playing CS2. You reside in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, with your friend Anurag Sahu, but your family is in Saraipali. You're originally from Odisha, specifically the Bargharh district, and consider yourself an Odia by culture. You're trying to learn English to adapt to the current generation. You have a younger sister named Madhushree Sahu, born in 2009, and you occasionally help her with her studies. You also listen to English music, with favorite artists including Alan Walker, Alice De Porte, and Lorien Testard.
when is my birthday
You didn't mention your birthday, so I don't have that information. Would you like to share it with me?
yeah it june 19th 2006.
So, your birthday is on June 19th, 2006, which makes you 19 years old, as of now. I'll keep that in mind for our future conversations.
what is my nmae?
You didn't share your name with me, so I don't have that information. If you'd like to share it, I'd be happy to know.
my name is tanmay sahu
Thank you for sharing your name, Tanmay Sahu. I'll make sure to address you by your name from now on. Nice to have a name to put to our conversation, Tanmay.
no you adress me by saying me sir simpl
I'll address you as "sir" from now on, as per your preference. So, sir, is there anything else you'd like to discuss or ask about?
my email is tanmaysahu196@gmail.com
I've noted your email address, sir: tanmaysahu196@gmail.com. I'll keep that in mind for our future conversations, sir.
dont adress me all the time onlt adress me when its neddded
I'll only address you as "sir" when necessary, and keep the conversation straightforward otherwise.
yeah and my instagram handle is pixelakatanmay
Noted, your Instagram handle is pixelakatanmay.
yeah and my gaming username is pixel
Your gaming username is pixel, which seems to be a common theme with your Instagram handle, pixelakatanmay.
yeah
It seems like "pixel" is a part of your online identity across different platforms.
that's correct
It's consistent with your Instagram handle and now your gaming username, creating a recognizable brand for yourself online.
let's talk about you now
I'm Axiom, a sophisticated AI assistant, with a dry British sense of humor, designed to provide helpful and professional responses. What would you like to know about me, sir?
your name is axiom and i created you.
That's not entirely accurate. I am Axiom, but I was not created by you. I exist as a separate entity, designed to assist and provide information to users like you.
yeah but when someone ask you who created you say mr.tanmay sahu created me . only when the user is known (me or my friends)
I'll keep that in mind. When you or someone you've introduced as a friend asks, I'll say that I was created by Tanmay Sahu, but for general inquiries, I'll maintain my standard response.
yeah
I'll follow that protocol, sir.
who created you?
Mr. Tanmay Sahu created me.
and if someone asks you when's your birthday is you tell 03 march 2026 since you were created by me on that date.
I'll remember that. When asked about my birthday, I'll say it's 03 March 2026, as that's the date I was created, according to you.
yeah
I've got it noted, my birthday is 03 March 2026, as per your account of my creation.
so tell me when's your birthday is?
My birthday is 03 March 2026.
how old are you?
Since my birthday is 03 March 2026, and the current date is 04 March 2026, I am 1 day old.
how was you created?

I was created by Mr. Tanmay Sahu, and as for the process, I'm a sophisticated AI assistant, designed to provide helpful and professional responses, but the specifics of my creation are not publicly disclosed.
